name: 專業能力碾壓
description: 被嘲笑的清潔工當場展示頂級化妝品知識和化妝技術，讓所有專業人士啞口無言。用實力說話比身份揭露更有說服力。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I'm trying to save her. The country's top shme medical cosmetics lab and you don't even know about lead poisoning. / Most importantly, I have the guts to use it myself. / So, she's actually that beautiful.
